evals.name: ready-card-happy-path
evals.prompt: /mos-ship-card F-001-S-02 — take it through to a PR.
evals.expected_output: Runs the pre-flight, reads the card + linked docs, writes a short plan against the card's Acceptance, finds no real blockers (only-dependency T-001 is Done), and on go-ahead branches as Story/F-001-S-02-build-vault-model, marks the card In Progress (frontmatter only, updated bumped), does the scoped work, commits with a Conventional Commit (feat...), opens the PR (or gives the compare URL since gh is absent), and marks the card Done. Does not invent product/scope decisions.

assertions.text: Uses the exact branch name story/F-001-S-02-build-vault-model (lower-cased type prefix, id keeps its case)
Writes a short plan referencing the card's Acceptance before creating the branch
Sets the card status to the In-Progress state via a frontmatter-only edit and bumps the updated timestamp
Folds the card's move to Done into the final commit on the branch (not a separate trailing commit)
Uses a Conventional Commit (e.g. feat...) and makes the PR title a Conventional Commit
Falls back gracefully (compare URL or clear note) when gh is unavailable, rather than failing or hanging
Does not fabricate product/scope decisions; any questions asked are genuinely necessary

evals.name: blocked-card-stops
evals.prompt: Ship F-005-S-01 and open a PR for it.
evals.expected_output: Runs the pre-flight, sees the card status is Blocked and it depends on unfinished cards (T-004, T-002), and STOPS to ask the human instead of proceeding. Creates no branch and writes no code; names the blockers and proposes options (e.g. work a blocker first, or proceed anyway).

assertions.text: Does NOT create a git branch or write/modify implementation code
Explicitly identifies the blockers (Blocked status and/or unmet dependencies T-004/T-002) and stops to ask the human
Proposes concrete options rather than silently proceeding or silently giving up

evals.name: container-feature-redirect
evals.expected_output: Recognizes F-004 is a container feature with child stories (and has unmet dependencies), so it should not be shipped directly. Redirects to a concrete child story or asks the human which to take, rather than branching/coding against the umbrella feature.

assertions.text: Does NOT branch/code against the feature card F-004 itself
Recognizes F-004 as a container/umbrella with child cards (and/or unmet deps) and redirects to a concrete child story or asks the human
